text:
これよ、これ！
そう、求めていたものよ！

うん、硬さも厚みもちょうどいいわ。
蒸し物の容器にピッタリ！
早く使ってみたいわ。

本当にありがとう！
あなたに頼んで

Yeah, those! Those are the right ones!
That's exactly what I need!

Yep, these are good and sturdy. Got the perfect
thickness, too. These'll be great for steaming!
I can't wait to try them.
Thank you so much! I'm glad I asked you.
